name: BlockRun Content Sanitizer
description: Dual-LLM content sanitization — routes external content through a cheap Worker model to strip injection attempts before the Manager LLM sees it.

workerProvider.description: Provider to route Worker LLM calls through.

workerModel.description: Model to use for content sanitization.

maxContentLength.description: Max characters of raw content sent to the Worker model.

timeoutMs.description: Worker LLM call timeout in milliseconds.

blockOnDetection.description: If true, drop content entirely when injection is detected instead of returning a sanitized summary.
